name: CBPR_Character_Set_Usage
description: All text values must use only CBPR+ permitted characters: A-Z, a-z, 0-9, space, and /\-?:().,'+
expression: all(re.match(r'^[A-Za-z0-9 /\-?:().,\'+]*$', str(v)) for k, v in DATA.items() if isinstance(v, str) and not k.endswith('@Ccy') and not k.endswith('@Tp') and not re.search(r'(IBAN|BIC|LEI|UETR|MsgId|BizMsgIdr|CreDtTm|IntrBkSttlmDt)', k))
errorMessage: Character set used does not comply with CBPR Plus UHB specifications. Only A-Z, a-z, 0-9, space and /\-?:().,\' are permitted.
fix: Remove characters outside the CBPR+ permitted set from all text fields.

name: CBPR_Business_Message_Identifier
description: BizMsgIdr must match the MsgId from the GroupHeader where available.
expression: not any(k.endswith('.GrpHdr.MsgId') for k in DATA.keys()) or any(DATA[k] == AppHdr.BizMsgIdr for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.GrpHdr.MsgId'))
errorMessage: AppHdr <BizMsgIdr> must match the underlying message <GrpHdr/MsgId> where available.
fix: Set <BizMsgIdr> to the same value as <GrpHdr><MsgId>.

name: CBPR_Message_Definition_Identifier
description: MsgDefIdr must be formatted exactly as it appears in the namespace of the Business Message instance (e.g. 'pacs.008.001.08').
errorMessage: AppHdr <MsgDefIdr> must match the namespace format exactly (e.g. 'pacs.008.001.08').
fix: Set <MsgDefIdr> to the correct ISO 20022 message identifier matching the document namespace.

name: CBPR_Business_Service_TextualRule
description: BizSvc may be used by SWIFT for differentiated processing. Reserved values apply for SWIFT-administered services. User-specific values require alignment with Service Administrator.
errorMessage: BizSvc value must be aligned with Service Administrator if using a user-specific value.

name: CBPR_Business_Service_Usage_TextualRule
description: BizSvc must match the expected CBPR+ service pattern (e.g. swift.cbprplus.02).
fix: Ensure <BizSvc> is correctly formatted, e.g. swift.cbprplus.02.

name: CBPR_Market_Practice_TextualRule
description: MktPrctc may be used by SWIFT on SWIFT-administered services. User-specific values require Service Administrator alignment.
errorMessage: MktPrctc value must be aligned with Service Administrator if user-specific.

name: CBPR_Related_Business_Application_Header
description: If RltdBizMsg is present, it must at minimum carry Fr, To, BizMsgIdr, MsgDefIdr, and CreDtTm mirroring the referenced BAH.
expression: exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.Fr) and exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.To) and exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.BizMsgIdr) and exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.MsgDefIdr) and exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.CreDtTm)
errorMessage: AppHdr <RltdBizMsg> must contain <Fr>, <To>, <BizMsgIdr>, <MsgDefIdr>, and <CreDtTm> from the referenced Business Application Header.
fix: Populate all mandatory BAH fields inside <RltdBizMsg>: Fr, To, BizMsgIdr, MsgDefIdr, CreDtTm.

name: CBPR_Related_BAH_Business_Service_TextualRule
description: If RltdBizMsg is present, it should carry the BizSvc element.

name: CBPR_Agent_BICFI_Exclusive_FormalRule
description: If FinInstnId.BICFI is present, Nm and PstlAdr are NOT allowed (CBPR+ BICFI exclusivity rule, applies to all agent roles across all message types).
expression: all(not(robust_exists(k.replace('.BICFI', '.Nm')) or robust_exists(k.replace('.BICFI', '.PstlAdr'))) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId.BICFI'))
errorMessage: If BICFI is present, then Name & Postal Address are NOT allowed.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Address_Required_FormalRule
description: If FinInstnId.BICFI is absent and Othr is also absent, Nm and PstlAdr MUST both be present (CBPR+ agent identification completeness rule).
expression: all(robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.Nm')) and robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId') and not robust_exists(k + '.BICFI') and not robust_exists(k + '.Othr'))
errorMessage: If BICFI is absent, Name and Postal Address must be present.
fix: Provide both <Nm> and <PstlAdr> inside <FinInstnId> if <BICFI> is not used.

name: CBPR_Party_AnyBIC_Exclusive_FormalRule
description: If Id.OrgId.AnyBIC is present, Nm and PstlAdr are NOT allowed (CBPR+ AnyBIC exclusivity rule, applies to all party roles across all message types).
expression: all(not(robust_exists(k.replace('.Id.OrgId.AnyBIC', '.Nm')) or robust_exists(k.replace('.Id.OrgId.AnyBIC', '.PstlAdr'))) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.Id.OrgId.AnyBIC'))
errorMessage: If AnyBIC is present, Name and Postal Address are NOT allowed.

name: CBPR_Party_Name_Address_Recommended
description: If Name is present on a party (Dbtr, Cdtr, UltmtDbtr, UltmtCdtr, InitgPty), it is recommended to also provide Postal Address.
expression: all(robust_exists(k.replace('.Nm', '.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.Nm') and (k.endswith('Dbtr.Nm') or k.endswith('Cdtr.Nm') or k.endswith('UltmtDbtr.Nm') or k.endswith('UltmtCdtr.Nm') or k.endswith('InitgPty.Nm')))
errorMessage: If Name is present, it is recommended to use Postal Address.
fix: Provide <PstlAdr> to complement the party's Name.
